description: Perform a dry-run migration inventory for an email server transition. Create a migration manifest at '~/Documents/migration_manifest.csv' including at least 15 emails from the Inbox with headers for 'Sender', 'Subject', and 'Date'. Organize the Inbox by creating at least 2 new folders and moving at least 10 emails into them. Draft an email to 'it-migration@company.com' with the subject 'Migration Dry Run Complete' reporting the total number of emails inventoried and folders created. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
